name: Aberdare Catchment Forest Restoration
blocking_factor: Smallholder encroachment on forest boundary and charcoal trade
notes: 22000 ha restoration target. 9800 ha under active restoration. Chania and Thiba river baseflows improving in monitored sub-catchments. Community forest associations cover 14 gazetted areas.

name: Nyeri County Stormwater Master Plan
blocking_factor: Not adopted — county technical capacity insufficient
notes: Master plan designed with World Bank TA. Not adopted by county assembly. Covers Nyeri town plus 6 major market centres. Would reduce annual flood damage by estimated KES 380m.

name: Chania River Riparian Enforcement
blocking_factor: High-density settlement on riparian land predates NEMA mandate
notes: 800+ structures built within 30m riparian buffer before 2005. Enforcement requires relocation. Political will absent in any election cycle. NEMA issues orders — county does not execute.

name: Nyeri Town Drainage Upgrade
blocking_factor: Budget absorption and colonial-era pipe replacement costs
notes: Phase 1 design complete. Existing colonial-era drainage pipes require full replacement not patching. Cost escalation has stalled procurement. Flooding in Kimathi Way and General Kago Road annual.

name: Tana Headwaters Early Warning
notes: River gauge network operational on Chania and Amboni rivers. Alert SMS sent to county emergency office. Community alert chain from county office to villages not formalised. Last-mile gap estimated at 72 hours.
